notes: Their main damage was Aurora (33k magical); 2/5 of you itemized magic resist.

draftNote: 2 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane), Cuban Noobster (jungle→carry).

coaching.headline: Two early Fangtooth fights snowballed a game where four of five lanes were unfavored.
coaching.team: On paper this should have been hard — only mid was favored, and your offlane, jungle and support were all read as theirs all game. You won it on objective tempo and discipline: back-to-back won fights at your Fangtooth (8.5 and 9 min, 2-0 each) flipped the early map, and from there you took the lead in objective kills (19 to 15). The two clean losses were the lesson — a 4v5 you flipped in the open at 20.4 (0-3, nobody to kill) and a needless 2v1 at 28 where Gideon and Phase fed Eden for nothing. Both were dumb battles with no major up; reset and farm instead. The close-out was textbook: you grouped on Primal Fangtooth at 31.7 and aced four of them, then ended.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Winning both Fangtooth skirmishes at 8.5 and 9 min, then grouping for the Primal Fangtooth fight at 31.7 (4-0) to close — objective control beat the lane reads.

perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Your Gideon won mid outright and it carried the early game — kills on Renna at 5.1 and 8.5 kept the favored lane snowballing while the rest of the map was even. The two deaths to watch both came in lost fights with nothing on the line: the 28-min 2v1 where you and Phase died to a single Eden was a free trade given away. When no major is up, don't take that.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Phase died 5 times, well over your usual 2, mostly in fights that were already going badly — the lost Fangtooth at 15.7 and the 28-min throw. Your mitigation was huge (899/min) so the frontline was there; the fix is fight selection, not your build. Don't follow the team into a 4v5 in the open at 20.4 with no objective to justify it.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: 13 kills and you were everywhere the objectives were — you led the close on Primal Fangtooth (4-0 at 31.7). But 7 deaths is high, and you carried no magic resist into a 3-magical enemy comp (Aurora alone did 33k magic). One resist item makes you far harder to delete in the fights you were already winning.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Best game on the board — 14 kills, 3 deaths, and you cleaned up both close-out fights. Eden had the early edge on you, but you flipped it: kills on Eden at 4.7, 10.3, 12 and 14.4 starved their carry before he came online. Keep doing exactly this — farm safe early, then take over once Vanquisher lands.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Crunch was unfavored into Aurora all game and you wore it (deaths at 5.5, 7.8, 10.4, 14.7 in lane). You still showed up in the won team fights at 14.4 and 21.9. Like Serath, you took no magic resist into a 3-magical comp — that's why Aurora kept blowing you up. One resist item changes that matchup.
